message:
fix(btree): validate full_page_size >= usable_size in write_overflow_chain

Without this check, a programming error passing full_page_size <
usable_size would cause a buffer overflow panic when writing chunk
data beyond the undersized page buffer. The check returns an internal
error instead of panicking.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
